\noindent We observe that this strategy results into the exact same model.
To run the stepwise procedure in both directions, we use the following code.

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\partopsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\parsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}%
}}
\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
fit_both, fit_both_terms = stepwise_aic(
    USSteamCoEstim,
    response='revenue',
    candidates=['production', 'coolDD', 'heatDD'],
    direction='both',
    start_terms=[],
)
print('Both-directions terms:', fit_both_terms)
print(fit_both.summary())
\end{Verbatim}
\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_light_blue}]
